caption: A man with a beard and shaved sides of his head is recording in a studio with sound-absorbing foam panels on the wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black headphones over his ears. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which bears the text "Rode". As the sequence progresses, the man expresses a range of emotions through his facial expressions and hand gestures. Initially, he has a neutral look, but his mouth quickly opens in a surprised or emphatic expression. He raises his left hand, gesturing with his fingers splayed. He then settles back into a more neutral facial expression while keeping his hand raised, eventually shifting his gaze and continuing to gesture with his hand as he speaks.
